title: Thankful
content:
Every year, the last Thursday of November reminds us to reflect on gratitude and the moments that have shaped us.

This Thanksgiving, I want to take a moment to be truly grateful for everything this past year has brought my way—the good, the bad, and everything in between. Each experience has shaped me, taught me, and made me stronger. I’m deeply thankful for everyone I’ve had the chance to meet along the journey—those still here and those I’ve lost touch with. You’ve all left an impact on me, and for that, I’m grateful.

As I look ahead, I carry these lessons, memories, and connections with me, thankful for the chance to grow and for the people who’ve been part of my journey.
